languages.text: The user's Willpower is reduced by −10%.

traits.locale_text:
After performing a weapon attack, the user must pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} penalty or suffer +{uip|Toxin|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} levels of toxin and immediately suffer an additional instance of damage from this effect.
While they have {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, they must pass the same test at the start of their turn.

After performing a weapon attack, the user must pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} penalty or suffer +{uip|Toxin|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} levels of toxin and immediately suffer an additional instance of damage from this effect.
While they have {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, they must pass the same test at the start of their turn.
The user's Willpower is reduced by −10%.
The user's Willpower is reduced by −10%.

After performing a weapon attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} or suffer +{uip|Toxin|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an additional instance of {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from this effect.
While they have {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, they must pass the same {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} at the start of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.original_text: The user's Willpower is reduced by −10%.

traits.locale_text:
Совершив атаку оружием, обладатель аугмента проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штрафом{/g} −{uip|DC|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156} и в случае провала испытывает {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} (+{uip|Toxin|1f84393d0f2942e2af37f1e3ba339156}) и немедленно получает внеочередной {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} от этого эффекта.
Пока у обладателя аугмента сохраняется {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}нейрогенный шок{/g}, он должен проходить эту{g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверку{/g} в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.
